title: Tarchon Interconnector Project: section 35 direction, Planning Act 2008
body: "Direction by the Secretary of State on the Tarchon Interconnector Project.  Date of decision  7 April 2025  Company / location  Tarchon Energy Limited  Type of project  Electricity Transmission Interconnector / Section 35 Direction, Planning Act 2008. "
